headline: DuPont Enhances FilmTec Portfolio With Advanced NF Technology
summary: DuPont launches upgraded FilmTec NF element, boosting filtration efficiency, lowering energy use, and targeting growth in advanced water treatment markets.

headline: Citrini's Election Trade Unwinds As Longs And Shorts Converge — Trump Alpha Wiped Out
summary:
In March 2024, independent investment research firm Citrini Research — founded in 2023 by James van Geelen — built a long/short market-neutral basket to trade the 2024 U.S. presidential election. 



The basket held long positions in stocks expected to benefit from a Republican win and short positions in names exposed to Democratic policy priorities.

headline: Albemarle (ALB) Valuation Rechecked After Recent Pullback And Strong 12 Month Share Price Return
summary: Why Albemarle Is Back on Investors’ Radar Albemarle (ALB) has drawn fresh attention after recent trading left the shares with a 1 day decline of about 4%, even as the stock shows a gain over the past 3 months and year. With a last close near US$174.50 and year to date total return above 20%, investors are reassessing how Albemarle’s energy storage focused business and current valuation line up with its recent revenue and earnings profile.
